unverifiedFields: industryBenchmarks.adoptionRate.max (55% from Gartner prediction not dual-verified with exact same value)

industryBenchmarks.productivityImprovement.max (55% from Copilot study vs 45% from other – not within 10%)

_meta.confidenceNotes: All pricing values are confirmed via official website and at least one reputable tech publication. Industry benchmarks for adoption and productivity are based on survey and research reports but exact percentages vary between sources; the provided numbers are approximate ranges with low confidence. Use with caution.
